assertions.rationale: v4 interface name change is not widely known without upgrade documentation

assertions.assertion: Output uses ClientCredentialsClientName.Parse() for the client name argument instead of a raw string
assertions.rationale: ClientCredentialsClientName.Parse() is a v4-specific strongly typed API not widely known

assertions.assertion: Output checks tokenResult.Succeeded before calling .GetToken() instead of directly accessing .Value
assertions.rationale: The v4 TokenResult<T> API with .Succeeded/.GetToken() is not widely known without docs

assertions.assertion: Output removes or notes that AddDistributedMemoryCache() is no longer required because v4 uses HybridCache automatically
assertions.rationale: HybridCache in v4 replacing IDistributedCache is a very specific v4 change

assertions.assertion: Output uses strongly-typed property setters like ClientId.Parse(), ClientSecret.Parse(), and Scope.Parse()
assertions.rationale: An LLM might partially get this from limited v4 examples online
